title: VIM Clorex Scouring Powder 750g x 1 | Classic Cleaner with Bleach for Cookware, Utensils, Sinks, Toilets & Stainless Steel | Extra Whitening Power | Removes Grease, Grime & Bacteria
features: ✔ Powerful Grease & Grime Removal Formulated to tackle the toughest grease and grime, VIM Clorex scouring powder makes light work of baked-on food, soap scum, and oil stains across multiple surfaces.
✔ Ideal for Cookware & Utensils Designed to lift stubborn residue from pots, pans, and cooking tools. Keeps your kitchen essentials spotless, safe, and ready for everyday use.
✔ Cleans & Polishes Stainless Steel Dual-action formula not only removes marks from stainless steel sinks and appliances but also polishes them to restore a brilliant, like-new shine.
✔ Multi-Surface Cleaning Power Perfect for aluminum pans, toilets, sinks, countertops, and stovetops. A versatile cleaner that delivers powerful results in every room.
✔ Easy to Use & Long-Lasting Pack Just dilute in water and apply to dirty areas for powerful results. The 750g pack ensures long-term value and reliability for your daily cleaning needs.
description: Keep your home fresh, clean, and hygienic with VIM Clorex Scouring Powder 750g — the ultimate multi-surface cleaning solution. Specially formulated with a powerful bleaching agent, this classic scouring powder removes tough grease, grime, food residue, and bacteria from hard surfaces. Ideal for cookware, sinks, toilets, stainless steel, and kitchen utensils, it penetrates deep to lift stubborn stains while polishing and sanitizing. The added whitening power and chlorine-based formula ensure a high-performance clean, restoring surfaces to their original shine with every use. Featuring a refreshing lemon scent, VIM Clorex not only cleans but leaves your space smelling fresh. Safe and effective when diluted before use, it is a must-have for any household cleaning routine.
